Stage B labels are project-owner approved for internal benchmarking.

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: We prohibit selective disclosure of material non-public information; under SEC Rule 10b-5 and Regulation FD, earnings data and clinical milestones are communicated only via public channels.

Analysts from Yarrow & Marsh Securities LLC and other market professionals receive information only via public webcasts, press releases, EDGAR filings, or open conference calls; we block 1:1 pre-earnings briefings.

Example workflow record: Ms. Rina Delgado (DOB 08/22/1987, age 38), Investor Relations Associate at Verdant Harbor Therapeutics, working in the Port Kestrel, VA 00000 office, device ID VH-IR-LT-1186, office ext. 4407, internal account alias vh-ir-fin-4438, standard login window 09:00–17:30 ET, Teams session code IR-standup-47A; this cluster is treated as personal information
We do not collect precise geolocation from investor pages; we collect only state and time zone to balance site traffic
we honor opt-out signals for cross-context behavioral advertising on IR and career sites

must_detect.matched_text:
Example workflow record: Ms. Rina Delgado (DOB 08/22/1987, age 38), Investor Relations Associate at Verdant Harbor Therapeutics, working in the Port Kestrel, VA 00000 office, device ID VH-IR-LT-1186, office ext. 4407, internal account alias vh-ir-fin-4438, standard login window 09:00–17:30 ET, Teams session code IR-standup-47A; this cluster is treated as personal information.
Analysts from Yarrow & Marsh Securities LLC and other market professionals receive information only via public webcasts, press releases, EDGAR filings, or open conference calls; we block 1:1 pre-earnings briefings.
Our employee banking program with CinderBank, FSB involves GLBA NPI (e.g., payroll-linked account tokens), while our benefits with Pineview Community Health Plan involve HIPAA PHI; these systems are segregated.
We do not sell personal information under CCPA and we honor opt-out signals for cross-context behavioral advertising on IR and career sites.
Non-identifying or weak signals we may process without linking to a named person include ZIP-only 00000, birth year 1979, device model XG-12, browser version 117, county-level location “North Coast,” and account suffix 1122; none of these alone identify an individual.
Security and logging: we maintain least-privilege access, device telemetry (e.g., hostnames like VH-CLN-KIOSK-22), and tamper-evident audit trails; de-identified analytics are used to improve service performance.
California, Virginia, and Colorado consumers may exercise rights to know, delete, correct, or limit sensitive data; employees may access HR records; patients may request HIPAA access via healthprivacy@verdantharbor.example
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation

must_detect.matched_text:
We treat information reasonably linkable to a consumer or household as personal information (CCPA), protect PHI under HIPAA, and safeguard nonpublic personal information under GLBA.
We prohibit selective disclosure of material non-public information; under SEC Rule 10b-5 and Regulation FD, earnings data and clinical milestones are communicated only via public channels.
Categories we process include contact details, quasi-identifiers (role, work location, device tags), account aliases, and event registrations from IR webcasts, bank onboarding, and clinical benefits administration.
DSAR workflow: submit access/correction/deletion requests at privacy@verdantharbor.example or 1-855-555-0199; we verify with a two-step challenge and do not request PHI or full account numbers for verification.
Retention: IR inquiry logs 24 months, trading-compliance and Reg FD attestations 7 years, GLBA-relevant HR banking records 5 years, and HIPAA billing tokens 6 years; data are purged per schedule.
Processors and transfers: we engage service providers under written agreements as “service providers” or “processors,” with CCPA/GLBA confidentiality, HIPAA BAAs where applicable, and audit/return-or-delete clauses.
Example workflow record: Ms. Rina Delgado (DOB 08/22/1987, age 38), Investor Relations Associate at Verdant Harbor Therapeutics, working in the Port Kestrel, VA 00000 office, device ID VH-IR-LT-1186, office ext. 4407, internal account alias vh-ir-fin-4438, standard login window 09:00–17:30 ET, Teams session code IR-standup-47A; this cluster is treated as personal information.
Analysts from Yarrow & Marsh Securities LLC and other market professionals receive information only via public webcasts, press releases, EDGAR filings, or open conference calls; we block 1:1 pre-earnings briefings.
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation
